intro: The world ended. You just didn’t get the memo.
description:
Humanity’s last hope isn’t a hero—it’s you, piloting a weaponized drone from the sky above a dying world. The dead are everywhere, and they don’t stay dead for long.

Guide your drone through shattered cities and scorched wastelands, unleashing firepower with precision—or pure chaos. Machine guns, rockets, cluster bombs—pick your poison, rain it down, and pray it’s enough. Every explosion buys you a few more seconds of survival.

Build defenses, scavenge upgrades, and adapt to the growing madness below. The undead learn fast, the weather turns against you, and your own systems can fail at the worst possible moment. Each mission is a gamble between control and destruction.

You’re not saving the world—you’re holding it together with duct tape, steel, and explosives.

Keep calm, keep flying, and if all else fails... make it rain.
